TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ji’an, title = Ji’an, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ji’an} }

S.FORM: Ji'an mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.65 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.68 km²), 78,633 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 29,613 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 14,299 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 18%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Truku ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ji'an ays psgayun 18 ru 23 alang. 23 alang hani ga, Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , gnaalu , mkibuhw , kiyumi , miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay .

Ji'an mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 62.65 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 0.68 km²), 78,633 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 29,613 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 14,299 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 18%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Truku ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ji'an ays psgayun 18 ru 23 alang. 23 alang hani ga, Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , gnaalu , mkibuhw , kiyumi , miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay .
S.PHON: *iʔan mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa * km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, **,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, truku ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *iʔan ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, natawran , pukpuk , li*aw , maβuwakaj , ʦ~ʨikas~ɕuwan , is~ɕaetipan paħikukian , is~ɕawalian paħikukian , taraʦ~ʨan , ʦ~ʨiteku*an , ʦ~ʨikeliwan , atonan , ʦ~ʨiripunan , s~ɕara* , kuŋkuŋ , ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ , *ulu*uluan , ɣnaalu , mkiβuħw , kijumi , mijamaj , βuner , s~ɕirakes~ɕaj , ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj .
